plan.title: Add a discoverable Composer-facing probe skill

narratives.Description: Composer agents currently see probe as a strategy document, not as a discoverable multi-turn workflow. This story adds a dedicated probe skill and routing so a request to run probe starts an interrogation loop instead of producing a premature artifact.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
1. Create the new file skills/deft-directive-probe/SKILL.md by lifting the concrete one-question-per-turn contract from strategies/probe.md, including explicit first-turn and no-artifact-before-complete requirements.
2. Update the AGENTS.md and templates/agents-entry.md routing code paths, then add pytest content tests in tests/content/test_agents_entry_contract.py and tests/content/test_probe_skill.py as verification evidence for trigger propagation.
narratives.UserStory: As a Deft operator, I want run-probe requests to load an explicit probe skill, so that Composer agents ask one focused question before writing any artifacts.
narratives.Traces: Issue #1518 comment: High priority add a Composer-facing probe skill; strategies/probe.md Workflow Step 2; AGENTS.md Skill Routing.

narrative.Acceptance: Given the user says run probe or /deft:run:probe, when an agent consults skill routing, then AGENTS.md and templates/agents-entry.md route to skills/deft-directive-probe/SKILL.md.
narrative.Traces: Issue #1518 probe attachment recommendation A; AGENTS.md Skill Routing.

items.title: Probe first turn cannot batch decisions

narrative.Acceptance: Given the probe skill is loaded, when the first user-facing probe turn is rendered, then the skill requires exactly one focused question plus the agent recommended answer and forbids batched decision lists.
Given a probe session has not met completion criteria, when an agent follows the new skill, then vBRIEF writes, plan updates, and GitHub completion comments are explicitly forbidden.
narrative.Traces: Issue #1518 comment; strategies/probe.md Transition criteria and Output sections.

narrative.Acceptance: Given consumer AGENTS.md is generated from templates/agents-entry.md, when content tests run, then the probe routing marker is asserted on both maintainer and template surfaces.

expected_outputs: content tests assert probe skill routing and frontmatter triggers without failing existing skill contracts
